text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, Australia/Sydney is UTC + 11. So the time difference is 11 - (-10) = 21 hours.
2. Add the time difference to 21:00 (9 PM): 21:00 + 21 hours = 18:00 (next day).
3. Since it's a positive time difference, the date in Sydney will be September 24, 1118.
FINAL_ANSWER: 18:00 on September 24, 1118
